git.message: fix: derive BASE_URL from Vite base so routing works on GitHub Pages - Remove hardcoded base from vite.config.ts; pass --base=/milan-kruger-magna/ at build time via workflow - const.ts: derive BASE_URL from import.meta.env.BASE_URL, fallback to /transgressions for local dev - workflow: pass --base flag, copy index.html->404.html, add .nojekyll for SPA deep-link support - Update GITHUB_PAGES_SETUP.md with routing explanation
